Help

Frequently asked questions.

Most things customers ask, answered. If yours isn't here, reach us on WhatsApp — we'll get back the same day.

Ordering

How do I place an order?

Two ways: add items to your bag and tap "Checkout on WhatsApp" — your full order summary will be sent to us on WhatsApp where we confirm sizes, delivery, and payment. Or message us directly on any product page using the "Ask on WhatsApp" button.

Do I need an account?

No. K-LINE MEN does not require sign-up. Your bag and wishlist live in your browser, and orders are confirmed via WhatsApp.

Can I order over the phone?

Yes. Call or WhatsApp the number listed in the footer. WhatsApp is faster because we can send pictures, sizes, and confirmations back and forth.

Sizing & fit

How do I choose the right size?

Each product page lists the sizes available. If you're unsure, message us on WhatsApp with the size you usually wear in another brand — we'll help match you.

Do shirts run slim or regular?

Most K-LINE MEN shirts are cut slim through the chest and waist with a tapered hem. If you prefer a fuller fit, take one size up or message us.

Do trousers come hemmed?

Trousers come unhemmed where indicated. Tell us your inseam on WhatsApp and we can advise the closest size.

Delivery

Do you deliver?

Yes — across Kampala, often same-day, and countrywide via our delivery partners. Delivery cost depends on your location and is confirmed by WhatsApp before dispatch.

How long does delivery take?

Within Kampala: same day to next day. Outside Kampala: 1–3 working days depending on the route. We'll send you a tracking update on WhatsApp.

Can I pick up from the showroom?

Yes. Place your order on WhatsApp and let us know you'd like to pick up — we'll have it ready for you.

Payment

How do I pay?

We accept Mobile Money (MTN/Airtel), bank transfer, card, and cash on delivery within Kampala. Payment details are shared on WhatsApp once your order is confirmed.

Is it safe to pay before delivery?

Yes. We send a confirmation message and an order ID with every order. If anything goes wrong, we make it right.

Returns & exchanges

Can I exchange an item?

Yes — within 7 days, items must be unworn, with tags attached. Most exchanges are for size. Final sale on accessories (belts, ties, watches, wallets).

Do you offer refunds?

We prefer to offer exchanges or store credit. Refunds are reviewed case by case — message us on WhatsApp.

What if my item arrives damaged?

Send us a photo on WhatsApp within 24 hours of delivery and we'll arrange a replacement at our cost.

Still have questions?

Tap below — same-day reply during opening hours.

Ask on WhatsApp
